repositories.brief_summary: Module-dependent functions merged, 20 new PRs opened for platform support and stdlib additions
repositories.new_features_summary: Module-dependent functions, lazy optimization, stdlib additions, runtime fixes
repositories.new_features:
- **Module-dependent functions** (modular explicits) allow writing functions parameterized over modules using `(module M : S) -> t[M]` syntax, providing a lightweight alternative to functors ([#13275](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13275), [#14048](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14048)) by [Samuel Vivien](https://github.com/samsa1) and [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche)
- **Lazy value optimization** for structured constants eliminates need for `Lazy.from_val` in most cases by optimizing `lazy v` when `v` is a constant ([#13919](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13919)) by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche)
- Fixed **infix-tag bug** in minor collector that could cause segfaults in multi-domain programs ([#14495](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14495)) by [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes)
- Fixed **segfault in Runtime_events** due to incorrect error checking when calling `mmap()` ([#14519](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14519)) by [Mark Elvers](https://github.com/mtelvers)
- **TSan function signature** corrected to fix `__tsan_func_exit()` mismatch ([#14082](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14082)) by [Hari Hara Naveen S](https://github.com/Johan511)
- **Thread-safe POSIX functions** adopted in libunix for better concurrency support ([#13700](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13700)) by [Antonin Décimo](https://github.com/MisterDA)
- Improved **C++ compiler detection** and testing to ensure headers can be included and linked properly ([#14526](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14526), [#14498](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14498)) by [Antonin Décimo](https://github.com/MisterDA) and [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27)
- **Dune build system** restored after recent breakage ([#14529](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14529)) by [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27)
- Cleaned up **opcode synchronization** between ocamlrun and ocamlc by eliminating `jumptbl.h` and `opnames.h` ([#14488](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14488), [#14528](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14528)) by [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27)
- Fixed **Ptype_external printing** in AST output ([#14518](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14518)) by [Patrick Ferris](https://github.com/patricoferris)
- Improved **shell script portability** for CI infrastructure ([#14520](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14520)) by [Damien Doligez](https://github.com/damiendoligez)
- Updated **documentation terminology** replacing "redefine" with "redeclare" in C interface docs ([#14521](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14521)) by [Antonin Décimo](https://github.com/MisterDA)
- Split **flat-float-array dependent test** for better testsuite organization ([#14523](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14523)) by [Florian Angeletti](https://github.com/Octachron)
- **OCAMLTEST manual** rewritten from Org format to AsciiDoc ([#14510](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14510)) by [Sacha Ayoun](https://github.com/giltho)
repositories.activity_summary: 20 new PRs opened including platform support, stdlib additions, and typing improvements
repositories.activity:
- Twenty **new PRs opened** this week including support for locally abstract types in recursive let bindings by [Alistair](https://github.com/johnyob) ([#14517](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14517)), nested record definitions proposal by [David Sancho](https://github.com/davesnx) ([#14527](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14527)), Merlin typing recovery integration by [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw) ([#14241](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14241)), unlimited non-constant constructors by [Vincent Laviron](https://github.com/lthls) ([#14507](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14507)), and pure functors by [Samuel Vivien](https://github.com/samsa1) ([#13905](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13905))
- **Standard library additions** include `Fun.todo` with code location by [Olivier Nicole](https://github.com/OlivierNicole) ([#14525](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14525)) and [Pavlo Khrystenko](https://github.com/pkhry) ([#13101](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13101)), `List.append_map` and `List.rev_append_map` by [Sylvain Boilard](https://github.com/SylvainBoilard) ([#13554](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13554)), `String.drop_prefix` and `String.drop_suffix` by [Michael Neumann](https://github.com/mneumann) ([#14487](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14487)), and `Atomic.modify`/`Atomic.modify_get` operations by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([#10798](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/10798))
- **s390x architecture support** receiving attention with shared library crash fix by [Zane Hambly](https://github.com/Zaneham) ([#14514](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14514)), native atomic fetch-add implementation ([#14524](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14524)), and CFI information fixes by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([#14500](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14500))
- **Platform-specific improvements** include POWER architecture TSan shadow stack fixes by [Olivier Nicole](https://github.com/OlivierNicole) ([#14302](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14302)) and CFI support by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([#14482](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14482)), RISC-V frame pointer support ([#14506](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14506)), FreeBSD frame pointer testsuite updates ([#14530](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14530)), and AMD64 endbr64 emission optimization by [Zane Hambly](https://github.com/Zaneham) ([#14515](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14515))
- **Runtime and memory management** work includes slow domain join fix by [Damien Doligez](https://github.com/damiendoligez) ([#13026](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13026)), gradual minor heap address reservation by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([#14162](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14162)), thread-local storage improvements ([#13355](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13355)), missing minor heap allocations fix by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([#14522](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14522)), runtime events cleanup on SIGINT by [Stephen Sherratt](https://github.com/gridbugs) ([#14470](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14470)), ephe_mark minor fix ([#14338](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14338)), mutex-protected lazy thunks ([#14393](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14393)), No_scan_tag macro replacements by [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes) ([#14493](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14493)), and `Obj.dup` closure fix ([#14492](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14492))
- **Type system and tooling** enhancements with warning 16 (`unerasable-optional-argument`) check improvements by [Alistair](https://github.com/johnyob) ([#14512](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14512)), ocp-indent check addition ([#14485](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14485)), and Dune build dependency improvements for opcodes sanity by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([#14509](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14509))
repositories.trends_summary: Focus on cross-platform support (s390x, POWER, RISC-V) and type system evolution
repositories.emerging_trends:
- **Cross-platform architecture support** intensifying with parallel efforts on s390x ([#14514](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14514), [#14524](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14524), [#14500](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14500)), POWER ([#14302](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14302), [#14482](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14482), [#14505](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14505)), RISC-V ([#14506](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14506)), and AMD64 ([#14515](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14515)) covering CFI information, frame pointers, atomic operations, and TSan compatibility
- **Module system evolution** continuing with module-dependent functions now merged ([#13275](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13275)) and pure functors proposed ([#13905](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13905)), suggesting ongoing work to make the module system more flexible and ergonomic
- **Standard library expansion** with multiple concurrent proposals for `Fun` module additions ([#14525](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14525), [#13101](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13101)), `String` utilities ([#14487](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14487)), `List` operations ([#13554](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13554)), and `Atomic` enhancements ([#10798](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/10798))
- **Type system refinements** in progress including locally abstract types in recursive bindings ([#14517](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14517)), unlimited non-constant constructors ([#14507](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14507)), and Merlin typing recovery integration ([#14241](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14241))
- **Runtime reliability improvements** addressing multi-domain issues ([#14495](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14495)), memory management ([#13026](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13026), [#14162](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14162), [#14522](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14522)), and profiling tools ([#14519](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14519), [#14470](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14470))
- **Language feature proposals** emerging including nested record definitions ([#14527](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14527)) suggesting ongoing community discussion about syntactic conveniences

repositories.brief_summary: Documentation improvements for raw field syntax merged alongside ongoing cmdliner upgrade discussions
repositories.new_features_summary: Enhanced opam list documentation to explicitly mention raw field selection syntax
repositories.new_features: - Documentation now **explicitly mentions raw field syntax** for `opam list --columns`, allowing users to select arbitrary fields using the `<field>:` format (e.g., `license:`) for querying package metadata ([#6846](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6846))
repositories.activity_summary: Test suite expansion and maintainer documentation under review alongside cmdliner vendor update planning
repositories.activity:
- [R. Boujbel](https://github.com/rjbou) opened draft PR to **expand test coverage for `opam list` format options**, split from the documentation improvements ([#6855](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6855))
- [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust) closed their original PR adding **`license` field support** after determining the raw-field syntax is sufficient for most use cases, reducing maintenance burden ([#6841](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6841))
- [Robin Bate Boerop](https://github.com/robinbb) proposed adding **`MAINTAINERS` file** and correcting maintainership assertions in README, pending opam team's GitHub access reorganization ([#6845](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6845), [#6844](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6844))
repositories.discussions_summary: Active planning for cmdliner vendor update with PowerShell completion support and UI improvement proposals
repositories.notable_discussions:
- **Cmdliner vendor update planning** progressing with [Josh Berdine](https://github.com/jberdine) reporting missing upstream bug fixes, team confirming backports for 2.6 milestone and future vendoring of cmdliner 2.1, while [Daniel Bünzli](https://github.com/dbuenzli) and [Brian Ward](https://github.com/WardBrian) discussed completion improvements including nuanced cases like switch-aware package suggestions ([#6849](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6849))
- [Brian Ward](https://github.com/WardBrian) proposed **PowerShell completion support** for Windows users by bumping vendored cmdliner with appropriate patches to preserve opam's prefix behavior ([#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853))
- [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) identified **repository origin display** as UI improvement needed when packages exist in multiple repositories, with team acknowledging it as good-to-have feature requiring information reconstruction ([#6852](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6852))
- [Will Thomas](https://github.com/Durbatuluk1701) reported bug where **`opam remove` leaves packages as "restorable"** even after force removal, questioning how to manually clear restorable status ([#6850](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6850))
repositories.trends_summary: Windows platform support improvements emerging as theme with completion and portability enhancements
repositories.emerging_trends:

- **Cmdliner modernization effort** moving forward with plans to vendor newer versions while preserving opam's specific behavior requirements, enabling better completion support across shells ([#6849](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6849), [#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853))
- **UI transparency enhancements** being discussed to surface more information about package sources and repository behavior to reduce user confusion ([#6852](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6852))

repositories.brief_summary: Signature help formatting improvements merged, with bug reports on type declaration navigation and module unbound errors
repositories.new_features_summary: Signature help now uses ocamlformat for improved readability of long function signatures
repositories.new_features: - **Signature help formatting** now applies ocamlformat to long function signatures, improving readability in editor tooltips by [Charlène_Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo) ([#1580](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1580)). The implementation includes parameter position recalculation after formatting to maintain accurate highlighting.
repositories.activity_summary: Ongoing flake.lock updates and user reports of type navigation and module binding issues
repositories.activity:
- Automated **Nix flake dependency updates** continue with the latest changes updating merlin from June 2025 to February 2026 and nixpkgs overlays ([#1437](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1437))
- Bug report on **type declaration navigation** where the LSP locate command returns "Already at definition point" when the cursor is positioned on a different declaration line, even when searching for a separate type identifier ([#1586](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1586)) - [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos) confirmed this shows incorrect behavior likely in Merlin core
- Persistent **unbound module errors** continue to affect users, with [Juan J. Martínez](https://github.com/reidrac) reporting experiencing the same issue as previously reported in ([#1209](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1209))
repositories.discussions_summary: Discussion on LSP error persistence after successful compilation requiring manual restart
repositories.notable_discussions: - [Juan J. Martínez](https://github.com/reidrac) reported that **ocamllsp sometimes fails to clear errors** after `dune build --watch` succeeds, requiring file re-saving or LSP restart to resync ([#1585](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/discussions/1585)) - the discussion received an answer addressing the synchronization issue
repositories.contributors_summary: Charlène_Gros implemented signature formatting, Ulysse provided bug triage, and users reported navigation and error persistence issues
repositories.contributors:

- [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos) triaged the type declaration navigation bug, confirming it as incorrect behavior likely originating in Merlin's typing environment handling ([#1586](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1586))

repositories.brief_summary: Signature help improvements and OCaml 5.5 planning discussions progressed with two new PRs under review

repositories.brief_summary: High-velocity week with markdown documentation generation, OxCaml .cms support, Windows fixes, extensive RPC refactoring, and sandbox tracing
repositories.new_features_summary: Markdown documentation generation, OxCaml .cms files support, Windows script execution fixes, disabled cram test error reporting, sandbox tracing
repositories.new_features:
- **Markdown documentation generation** added via `dune build @doc-markdown` alias using odoc 3.1.0, enabling conversion of odoc documentation to markdown format ([#12581](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/12581))
- **OxCaml `.cms` files support** for generating and using shape files containing trimmed type information, enabled with `(using oxcaml 0.1)` and `-bin-annot-cms` flag ([#13397](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13397))
- **Windows script execution** now parses shebang lines to invoke appropriate interpreters for configure scripts, fixing package management builds requiring `./configure` ([#13293](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13293))
- **Windows OS distribution detection** correctly identifies Cygwin and MSYS2 environments for package management solver ([#13536](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13536))
- **Disabled cram test error reporting** now shows explicit errors when users request disabled tests instead of silent failures ([#13081](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13081))
- **Sandbox tracing events** added for destruction, snapshotting, and extraction operations to improve debugging and observability ([#13538](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13538), [#13541](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13541), [#13544](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13544))
- **`patch_back_source_tree` sandboxing mode** allows actions to modify dependencies with changes reflected as promotions requiring manual approval, enabling safer linter integration ([#13495](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13495))
- Fixed **`dune exec --watch` process killing** for long-running processes that weren't being terminated on file changes since 3.20.1 ([#12360](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/12360))
- **`dune format-dune-file`** now uses project's dune-lang version instead of hardcoded version, improving compatibility ([#11865](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/11865))
- Fixed **git rev_store bug** where non-existent commits were incorrectly declared as present ([d93a8e0](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/commit/d93a8e089278c8520b0ea9f46dde1fdb19bcb6ab))
- **Melange.emit stanza** now respects `-p <PKG>` flag for package-specific builds ([#13522](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13522))
- Removed **`--ignore-lock-dir` flag** in favor of unified `--pkg=disabled` flag for clearer package management semantics ([#13498](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13498))
repositories.activity_summary: 52 PRs merged including major RPC refactoring, path system improvements, Melange support, and extensive test coverage additions
repositories.activity:
- **Extensive RPC system refactoring** by [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg) with 14+ merged PRs reorganizing csexp_rpc into separate modules for client, server, session, and socket ([#13550](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13550)), removing signature duplication ([#13548](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13548)), introducing abstract method name types ([#13578](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13578)), merging Fiber_event_bus into Fiber ([#13547](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13547)), and breaking change separating write/close operations ([#13569](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13569))
- **Path system improvements** including strict extension type requiring extensions to start with "." ([#13584](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13584)), removal of `Path.exists` ([#13583](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13583)), and removal of `Path.is_directory` ([#13582](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13582)) impacting 139 files total
- **Rocq CI re-enabled** by [Ali Caglayan](https://github.com/Alizter) with Coq removed from nix flake and 736 lines of test output updates ([#13529](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13529))
- **Melange improvements** including `melange.emit` respecting `-p <PKG>` flag ([#13522](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13522)) and test showing in-source promotion shortcomings ([#13537](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13537)) by [Antonio Nuno Monteiro](https://github.com/anmonteiro), with backport to 3.21.1-rc ([#13563](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13563))
- **Test infrastructure improvements** with menhir version-agnostic tests ([#13534](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13534), [#13561](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13561)), rev_store mutable state reproduction ([#13559](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13559)), and `(dir ..)` interaction tests ([#13351](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13351))
- **OxCaml compatibility** added with eta-expansions for function compatibility ([#13562](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13562)) and comprehensive `.cms` file tests including dependency handling and instantiation ([#13397](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13397))
- **Package management fixes** including removal of obsolete `--ignore-lock-dir` flag ([#13498](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13498)), git rev_store bug fix ([d93a8e0](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/commit/d93a8e089278c8520b0ea9f46dde1fdb19bcb6ab)), and test for exported_env opam variable handling ([#13524](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13524))
- **Documentation and cleanup** with format-dune-file action documentation fixes ([#13540](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13540)), removal of `program_not_found_message` utility ([#13546](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13546)), library dependency fixes ([#13527](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13527), [#13528](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13528)), and Fpath.traverse semantics tweaks ([#13530](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13530))
- **BSD platform support** with ocaml-lmdb bump fixing NetBSD and OpenBSD builds ([#13560](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13560)) addressing earlier build breakage ([#13070](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13070))
- **RPC server improvements** including stopping RPC startup with `dune promote` ([#13564](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13564)) and test exit code fixes for 3.21 ([#13565](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13565))
repositories.trends_summary: Heavy internal refactoring for code quality, accelerated Windows support, package management maturation, and growing OxCaml ecosystem integration
repositories.emerging_trends:
- **Internal code quality focus** with [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg) leading systematic refactoring across RPC, path systems, and internal modules, reorganizing over 2000 lines while improving maintainability and reducing duplication
- **Windows ecosystem enablement** progressing rapidly with script execution ([#13293](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13293)), OS detection ([#13536](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13536)), and multiple blockers resolved ([#11174](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/11174), [#13310](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13310)), moving closer to full package management support on Windows
- **Package management CLI cleanup** unifying flags for clearer semantics, removing `--ignore-lock-dir` in favor of `--pkg=disabled` ([#13498](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13498)) following introduction of explicit `--pkg` control ([#13458](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13458))
- **OxCaml compiler integration** expanding with `.cms` shape file support ([#13397](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13397)), compatibility fixes ([#13562](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13562)), and ongoing work for parameterized library support ([#13414](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13414))
- **Enhanced observability** through sandbox tracing events ([#13538](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13538), [#13541](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13541), [#13544](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13544)) providing better debugging capabilities for build operations
- **Release cycle activity** with 3.21.1 release preparation underway ([#13557](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13557)) including multiple backports and compatibility fixes for the stable branch
- **Testing culture strengthening** with reproduction cases added before fixes ([#13559](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13559), [#13587](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13587)), version-agnostic tests ([#13534](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13534)), and comprehensive test suites for new features

repositories.brief_summary: Active week with 19 package releases merged including Lwt 6.1.0, Menhir updates, and multiple new testing libraries
repositories.new_features_summary: Lwt 6.1.0 stable release, Menhir 20260203 parser generator update, and new layoutz terminal DSL package
repositories.new_features:
- **Lwt 6.1.0** stable release by [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust) brings the promises and event-driven I/O library to production readiness after alpha and beta testing, with version name corrections for beta packages ([#29295](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29295), [#29336](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29336))
- **Menhir 20260203** parser generator release by [François Pottier](https://github.com/fpottier) across 5 packages (menhir, menhirCST, menhirGLR, menhirLib, menhirSdk) with fixed Rocq back-end printing bug from version 20260122 ([#29331](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29331), [#29332](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29332))
- **Grenier 0.16** algorithm library by [Frédéric Bour](https://github.com/let-def) adds `is_singleton` function for OCaml 5.5 compatibility and rank-based element access functions in Balmap ([#29349](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29349))
- **Camlzip 1.14** compression library by [Xavier Leroy](https://github.com/xavierleroy) fixes errors in local file headers for files larger than 4 GB ([#29352](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29352))
- **DKIM 0.10.0** email authentication library by [Calascibetta Romain](https://github.com/dinosaure) now uses `x=` field in DKIM-Signature headers for expiration handling across 4 packages ([#29335](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29335))
- **Moonpool 0.11** threading library by [Simon Cruanes](https://github.com/c-cube) adds `Fut.for_iter`, fixes flambda mutex ordering issues, and abstracts tracing stub type ([#29339](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29339))
- **Alt-Ergo Free 2.4.3** SMT prover by [Pierre Villemot](https://github.com/Halbaroth) now includes bytecode-only OCaml conflict to prevent compilation failures on pure bytecode platforms ([#29341](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29341))
- **React Rules of Hooks PPX 1.1.0** by [David Sancho](https://github.com/davesnx) adds `[@disable_order_of_hooks]` attribute, supports snake_case hook names, fixes static deps scope leaking, and adds monadic `let+`/`and+` syntax support ([#29333](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29333))
- **Layoutz 0.0.1** and **0.0.2** new zero-dependency terminal layout DSL by [Matthieu Court](https://github.com/mattlianje) for creating structured terminal output including boxes, tables, and trees with simplified color API ([#29327](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29327), [#29328](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29328))
- **Hevea 2.38** LaTeX-to-HTML converter released by [Luc Maranget](https://github.com/maranget) ([#29342](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29342))
- **Jingoo 1.5.2** template engine released by [tategakibunko](https://github.com/tategakibunko) ([#29343](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29343))
- **Pxshot 0.1.2** screenshot API SDK by [Lucas Vieira](https://github.com/vieiralucas) fixes lower-bounds CI by excluding examples from package build ([#29325](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29325))
- **Mset 0.2.0** small multisets library by [Jean-Christophe Filliatre](https://github.com/backtracking) fixes bug from 0.1.0 release ([#29326](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29326))
- **Catala-LSP 1.1.1** language server by [vbot](https://github.com/vincent-botbol) fixes bugs from 1.1.0 with version 1.1.0 marked as avoid-version ([#29329](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29329))
- **Codex 1.0~rc4** static analysis library by [Matthieu Lemerre](https://github.com/mlemerre) releases three packages (binsec_codex, codex, frama_c_codex) for building static analyzers based on abstract interpretation ([#29259](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29259))
- **Alpine Linux** package configuration updated by [François Bobot](https://github.com/bobot) moving flint-dev to edgecommunity repository ([#29330](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29330))
repositories.activity_summary: Multiple ongoing PRs including js_of_ocaml 6.3.0 with WASM improvements, testcontainers library submissions, and trace library rework
repositories.activity:
- **Js_of_ocaml 6.3.0** opened by [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo) with 8 packages bringing WASM optimizations including number unboxing, reference unboxing, constant sinking pass, shell completion scripts, improved NaN handling, and numerous DOM/WebGL binding fixes ([#29348](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29348))
- **Testcontainers-OCaml** library submission by [Sachin Beniwal](https://github.com/benodiwal) adding Docker container support for integration tests with 11 packages covering PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, Memcached, LocalStack, and MockServer modules, with discussion about CI test failures due to Docker requirements ([#29340](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29340), [#29350](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29350), [#29338](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29338))
- **Trace 0.11** tracing library rework by [Simon Cruanes](https://github.com/c-cube) with lighter collector using open sum types, extensible metrics, removal of global state, and poly variants for user_data/span_flavor, with tracy-client 0.7 upgrade depending on it ([#29345](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29345), [#29346](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29346), [#29347](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29347))
- **Bogue 20260208** GUI library update by [珊瑚](https://github.com/sanette) introduces API changes requiring companion PRs to update version constraints for bogue-tutorials and snoke packages ([#29351](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29351), [#29353](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29353), [#29354](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29354))
- **Frama-clang 0.0.19** ongoing work by [Basile Desloges](https://github.com/zilbuz) and [Virgile Prevosto](https://github.com/vprevosto) addressing conf-libclang depext issues for Debian/Ubuntu/Alpine, adding patches via opam-source-archives, and resolving lower bounds requirements ([#29309](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29309))
- **Frama-c-lannotate 0.2.5** submitted by [Frama-CI Bot](https://github.com/frama-ci-bot) with ongoing review regarding dune dependency and Windows failures related to conf-graphviz depext issues ([#29344](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29344))
- **Shibboleth 0.0.4** SML-OCaml converter by [Asher Frost](https://github.com/wizard7377) remains open with maintainer returning from hiatus ([#29256](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29256))
- **OR-Tools 9.15.0** optimization library submission by [Timothy Bourke](https://github.com/tbrk) closed without merge, includes Google OR-Tools v9.15 source with rewritten C++ interface ([#29355](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29355))
repositories.discussions_summary: Version naming discussion for Lwt beta releases and CI testing policy for Docker-dependent packages
repositories.notable_discussions:
- **Lwt version ordering** issue raised by [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) regarding lwt.6.0.0-beta01 being sorted after lwt.6.0.0 instead of before, fixed by renaming to use tilde separator (6.0.0~beta01) for proper semantic versioning ([#29334](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29334))
- **Testcontainers CI testing** discussion between [Sachin Beniwal](https://github.com/benodiwal) and [Jan Midtgaard](https://github.com/jmid) about handling Docker-requiring tests in opam-repository CI, exploring options including disabling runtest, commenting out network tests, or adding x-ci-accept-failures entries to avoid 429+ consistent failures on dependency updates ([#29340](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29340))
- **Conf-graphviz Windows depext** issue reported by [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust) showing missing "dot" command on Windows platforms affecting multiple packages ([#29323](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29323))
repositories.trends_summary: Ecosystem maturation with production releases of previously beta packages and increased focus on testing infrastructure
repositories.emerging_trends:
- **Library maturation cycle** visible through Lwt's progression from alpha/beta to stable 6.1.0 release, showing careful testing and version naming corrections before production deployment
- **Testing infrastructure expansion** with testcontainers-ocaml introducing Docker-based integration testing patterns to OCaml ecosystem, raising CI policy questions about packages requiring external services
- **WASM compilation improvements** continuing in js_of_ocaml with number unboxing, reference unboxing, and constant sinking optimizations
- **Package maintenance attention** to version constraints and compatibility, evidenced by multiple companion PRs updating version bounds when APIs change (Bogue, trace, Lwt)
- **Static analysis tooling growth** with Codex 1.0~rc4 and frama-clang updates bringing formal verification and abstract interpretation capabilities
- **Terminal UI development** with new layoutz package and Bogue updates showing interest in native OCaml terminal and GUI applications
- **Cross-platform packaging refinements** addressing platform-specific depext issues for Alpine, Debian, Ubuntu, and Windows

repositories.brief_summary: Release 6.3.0 with constant sinking optimization, improved DOM bindings, and compiler bug fixes
repositories.new_features_summary: Constant sinking optimization, WASM-safe Dom_html.onload, runtime_value API, boolean-to-integer conversion elimination
repositories.new_features:
- **Constant sinking compiler optimization** moves constant declarations closer to usage sites for better code organization, enabled by default with `--enable constant-sinking` flag ([2d01350](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/2d0135073234045ace7aecc9e676114e91a690ac), [#2167](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2167))
- New `Dom_html.onload` function provides **WASM-safe load handling** as alternative to window.onload event ([7713217](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/7713217c3c0d3108689c38029c064a851697d22d), [#1948](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/1948))
- Added `Js.Unsafe.runtime_value` API allows **referencing values from the JavaScript runtime** using `//Provides:` directives ([ea26189](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/ea26189b5d0d1053a0dce839bcffdb05a949360d), [#2086](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2086))
- **Eliminated unnecessary boolean-to-integer conversions** in generated code for cleaner JavaScript output ([8627d6f](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/8627d6f5e12a9bb411dc2d046181c7fb24c32f74), [#2168](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2168))
- Fixed **parallel renaming bug** in compiler that could cause variable name conflicts ([9cf9411](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/9cf94111319f3831627d178dca3390dd416d14b5), [#2156](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2156))
- Fixed **static evaluation of `caml_nativeint_to_int`** primitive operation ([51abfcd](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/51abfcd3d0b6b6f696b87894e351e195f885a6dd))
- Removed **invalid conditional simplification** that could cause incorrect code generation ([2b6f607](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/2b6f6070a4b879952be550060b4e0eac93c0eca8))
- Fixed **`Global_flow.do_escape` monotonicity** issue affecting compiler correctness ([61b2c25](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/61b2c254c0a3da2ce96bc62bda140a76c141c28a))
- Fixed **bound checking in targetint** module ([80ccb02](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/80ccb02d0ffe61bf75a85264237df1bfaf735f11))
- Fixed **`Form.get_form_elements` infinite loop bug** in DOM API ([b16b3b0](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/b16b3b0d7dc321b677cbd94e850407aeface340b))
- Fixed multiple **DOM API type bindings** including `submitEvent.submitter` (now optional), `mediaQueryListEvent` properties (swapped types), `pointerEvent` consistency, `element.scrollWidth/scrollHeight` (now readonly), and `eventSource.url`, `file.lastModifiedDate`, `position.timestamp`, `numberList`, and WebGL `_ACTIVE_TEXTURE_` types ([2b57432](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/2b5743b23e7f042d2d328dc35423f0c33da695d8), [c8d6e12](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/c8d6e129210c580a61c2a99b27fddd7d7e8f57f7), [5798832](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/5798832edf06b2b08574c1c0bcda3ffc0be1f4ed), [1ff8188](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/1ff81883c103f67d27be807937e658a8de0cd151), [6de0da5](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/6de0da53f1c9525ccf6ddb5a4ebe83d2cbe95c8f), [bf8aaaf](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/bf8aaaf7d3cd67051aa6a45fdf34fcc152eca011))
- Removed **non-existent `setDay` and `setUTCDay` methods** from `Js.date` API ([e23569f](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/e23569fc855cc9b356b87e70640d4dbcc82b512d))
- Fixed **`characterData.substringData` method name typo** in Dom module ([af195d5](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/af195d5fa07f96289402fc0a0bad61ff6bf3be8c))
- Fixed **graphics resize and clear** functionality in runtime ([238d361](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/238d3610a3226a184868882bf440248c3a7ea079))
- Improved **tracking of generated names** for better compiler memory efficiency ([e11a80e](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/e11a80ef76e47a6ef9431e997defc24124ea5fa7), [4bf89f0](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/4bf89f09af5d871147b69e64e85f59f50943e197), [#2157](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2157))
- Made **`Js_traverse.iter` and `Js_traverse.map` consistent** in traversal order ([1bc3363](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/1bc3363bc7441ff9d2a5bd9de1e4e1bfb967f90c), [#2158](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2158))
- Fixed **Windows build compatibility** ([13dfd19](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/13dfd19bcfe7bd6eb21ade9a06e44b3c38eb1bbe), [#2171](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2171))
- **Improved examples** with 12 commits enhancing boulderdash, cubes, graph viewer, graphics, hyperbolic, minesweeper, planet, webgl, wiki, and wysiwyg demos for better code organization and user experience ([e033ed6](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/e033ed66894959c2b38d1d2b0b8180dc1912fe33), [c40d2bf](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/c40d2bf7b88d09393deb9ead699df55f26f395c4), [0b280ce](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/0b280cec5d450177f6a66c13f2f6934c0f362c97), [1dc690b](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/1dc690bad50b3459d3e371f61a2ccc4f82a31bcf), [a925eb1](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/a925eb198d7f626ad5030e43d5d3664a0479f970), [0118ce3](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/0118ce3abc43a62f2e816e7d0bcfbea89e373477), [16522ab](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/16522ab9cc927995ce78130766395a967c6bef7c), [9a5c6fa](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/9a5c6faebd5efe25243be2d5ab2134bd5d26e5e1), [2a8150d](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/2a8150d2c0ba1cbcce31cf9d4d9c6f9e2df35638), [dbe4426](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/dbe4426e0cbe28935441d65c3b72621b611c4049), [e162166](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/e162166862bfd8cfdff2c5d898ae1140b086f70b), [c786ac0](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/c786ac0eb6d4ef41cc1618d3faa5da5824256e66))
- **Improved toplevel examples** including graphics support and code sharing design ([05e0981](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/05e0981d4c005bee2ed713e7545eb46bdc746346), [417eb35](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/417eb3575d8a32bdca60c61e84e9fe867b468af8), [f1ef533](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/f1ef533010e8e922031cfa726db27b4ee31307dd))
- Added **API status documentation** and improved manual with better links and organization ([43b6085](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/43b60853d678c85f3a571eb33d7662125f80a221), [3e27688](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/3e27688a5aff285a91dbd1bda4213382b809cfe8), [44f449f](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/44f449fdae421c623dd6b0357816f95525524f92), [7b5c6bc](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/7b5c6bc3b4b90cc0e6a18c60c73cc1bcdc0bd9c7), [#2155](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2155), [#2161](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2161))
- Added **documentation for pure functions and loops** in compiler internals ([8a164f9](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/8a164f9928d9a12e88b2fdb1a0c264140800d507), [#2170](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2170))
repositories.activity_summary: Finalized 6.3.0 release with 67 commits improving compiler correctness, DOM bindings, and examples
repositories.activity:

- **Compiler correctness fixes** addressed parallel renaming bug ([9cf9411](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/9cf94111319f3831627d178dca3390dd416d14b5)), Global_flow monotonicity ([61b2c25](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/61b2c254c0a3da2ce96bc62bda140a76c141c28a)), static evaluation of caml_nativeint_to_int ([51abfcd](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/51abfcd3d0b6b6f696b87894e351e195f885a6dd)), invalid simplification ([2b6f607](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/2b6f6070a4b879952be550060b4e0eac93c0eca8)), and targetint bounds ([80ccb02](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/80ccb02d0ffe61bf75a85264237df1bfaf735f11))
- **DOM binding improvements** by [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo) fixed numerous type issues in Dom_html (submitEvent, mediaQueryListEvent, pointerEvent, element scrollWidth/scrollHeight), Dom_svg (numberList), and other modules (eventSource.url, file types, geolocation timestamp, WebGL constants), plus removed non-existent Js.date methods ([2b57432](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/2b5743b23e7f042d2d328dc35423f0c33da695d8), [c8d6e12](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/c8d6e129210c580a61c2a99b27fddd7d7e8f57f7), [5798832](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/5798832edf06b2b08574c1c0bcda3ffc0be1f4ed), [e23569f](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/e23569fc855cc9b356b87e70640d4dbcc82b512d))
- **Example and documentation enhancements** included 12 commits improving demo applications (boulderdash, cubes, graph viewer, graphics, hyperbolic, minesweeper, planet, webgl, wiki, wysiwyg), toplevel examples with better graphics support, and new API status documentation with improved manual organization ([multiple commits](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/compare/759ad73aa6360b977048524e7ac07866222d6ec9...c5a6d4daec9be9d8ec3bcac6101b336cf95a316c))
- **Runtime improvements** fixed graphics resize/clear functionality ([238d361](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/238d3610a3226a184868882bf440248c3a7ea079)) and Windows build compatibility ([13dfd19](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/13dfd19bcfe7bd6eb21ade9a06e44b3c38eb1bbe))
- **Testing infrastructure** added new tests for scopes, forIn/forOf loops ([2ed2277](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/2ed2277a8ec822e67b8d79611d76e5fb61a22172)), constant sinking behavior, and bool context handling, plus reorganized test directories by moving namespace and separate compilation examples out of examples/ ([7af7c03](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/7af7c039524d7e262fd2e0fcd3f946cc1cf1d111), [c3f4a92](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/c3f4a9200e3de0f87cfbb166d485cb64c8bf379f))

repositories.brief_summary: Type system additions with bool# primitives, borrowing support, and new Format_doc API
repositories.new_features_summary: Added bool# type with #true/#false literals, borrowing support, -kind-verbosity flag, and Format_doc API
repositories.new_features:
- New `bool#` unboxed boolean type with `#true` and `#false` literal syntax added to the language, enabling efficient representation of boolean values at the bit level ([#5166](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5166))
- **Borrowing support** introduced in the uniqueness analysis system, allowing temporary borrows of unique values with proper type checking and mode analysis ([#5215](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5215))
- New `-kind-verbosity` compiler flag controls kind printing detail level with three modes: 0 (not verbose), 1 (expanded), and 2 (expanded with all modality bounds) ([#5397](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5397), [#5398](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5398))
- **Format_doc** module backported from upstream OCaml providing structured document formatting with type-safe printer combinators as an evolution of Format module ([#5357](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5357))
- Type representation syntax `repr_` added to source syntax with `Ptyp_repr` and `Ttyp_repr` AST nodes for explicit type representation annotations ([#5068](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5068))
- **Runtime optimization** eliminating stack switches on noalloc C calls, improving performance for FFI boundaries ([#5224](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5224))
- Interference graph extracted to dedicated module `Regalloc_interf_graph` in register allocator with cleaner API and degree tracking ([#5237](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5237))
- **x86 binary emitter** fix for shift instructions with memory destination and CL register preventing incorrect code generation ([#5369](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5369))
- Array runtime functions renamed following upstream changes for consistency (`caml_make_vect` → `caml_make_array`, etc.) ([#5339](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5339))
- Local annotations added to type checking infrastructure improving mode tracking for local values ([#5366](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5366))

repositories.trends_summary: Focus on type system refinement, upstream synchronization, and runtime optimization
repositories.emerging_trends:
- **Unboxed types expansion** continues with `bool#` type joining existing bits8/float32 primitives as OXCaml extends beyond OCaml's value kind system to support additional efficient representations
- **Modality and mode system maturation** showing sustained activity across multiple contributors working on functors, aliased many requirements, redundant warnings, and cross-module interactions indicating this is becoming production-ready
- **Upstream OCaml 5.4 integration** accelerating with Format_doc backport (253 files changed) and array runtime changes representing continued effort to stay synchronized while maintaining OXCaml-specific features
- **Borrowing semantics** introduction marks evolution of uniqueness analysis beyond simple ownership to support temporary borrows, bringing Rust-like capabilities to OCaml's type system
- **CFG backend hardening** with Xavier Clerc's systematic work on invariant checking, liveness validation, and terminator arity tests showing maturation toward production stability
- **Flambda2 optimization refinement** through reaper fixes, match-in-match improvements, and inlining heuristic tuning demonstrating ongoing enhancement of the advanced optimization pipeline
- **Build system evolution** through Chamelon module minimization and ocamlformat consistency improvements supporting better developer experience and reduced compilation overhead
- **Backend code generation** receiving attention with x86 shift bug fix, register allocator refactoring, and interference graph extraction showing focus on correctness and maintainability
- **Type representation** at syntax level with `repr_` additions enabling more explicit control over memory layout and representation choices in the type system

group_summaries.new_features_summary: Lwt 6.1.0 stable release, security grants announcement, and OCaml history page restoration
group_summaries.new_features:
- **Lwt 6.1.0** stable release by [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust) brings the promises and event-driven I/O library to production readiness after alpha and beta testing, with version name corrections for beta packages ([ocaml/opam-repository#29295](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29295), [ocaml/opam-repository#29336](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29336))
- **Security grants announcement** published by [@sabine](https://github.com/sabine) with up to €100,000 available for projects strengthening OCaml ecosystem security, with proposals due March 1st, 2026 ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3483](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3483))
- **OCaml history page** restored by [Cuihtlauac Alvarado](https://github.com/cuihtlauac) documenting the language's evolution from Caml at INRIA in the 1980s through modern OCaml, including key contributors and institutions ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3479](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3479))
- **Menhir 20260203** parser generator release by [François Pottier](https://github.com/fpottier) across 5 packages with fixed Rocq back-end printing bug from version 20260122 ([ocaml/opam-repository#29331](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29331), [ocaml/opam-repository#29332](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29332))

group_summaries.brief_summary: High-velocity week with dune's 52 merged PRs, js_of_ocaml 6.3.0 release, and coordinated OCaml 5.5 planning across tools
group_summaries.new_features_summary: Dune markdown docs, OxCaml .cms support, Windows fixes; js_of_ocaml constant sinking; ocaml-lsp signature formatting; opam raw field docs
group_summaries.new_features:
- [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) added **markdown documentation generation** via `dune build @doc-markdown` using odoc 3.1.0 ([ocaml/dune#12581](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/12581)), **OxCaml `.cms` files support** for trimmed type information with `(using oxcaml 0.1)` ([ocaml/dune#13397](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13397)), **Windows script execution** with shebang parsing ([ocaml/dune#13293](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13293)), **Windows OS detection** for Cygwin/MSYS2 ([ocaml/dune#13536](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13536)), **sandbox tracing events** for debugging ([ocaml/dune#13538](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13538), [ocaml/dune#13541](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13541), [ocaml/dune#13544](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13544)), and **`patch_back_source_tree` sandboxing mode** for safer linter integration ([ocaml/dune#13495](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13495))
- [ocsigen/js_of_ocaml](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml) **released version 6.3.0** (February 6) with **constant sinking optimization** moving declarations closer to usage ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2167](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2167)), **WASM-safe `Dom_html.onload`** function ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#1948](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/1948)), **`Js.Unsafe.runtime_value` API** for referencing runtime values ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2086](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2086)), eliminated unnecessary boolean conversions ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2168](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2168)), and fixed multiple DOM binding types
- [ocaml/ocaml-lsp](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp) now applies **ocamlformat to signature help** for improved readability of long function signatures ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1580](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1580))
- [ocaml/opam](https://github.com/ocaml/opam) documentation now **explicitly mentions raw field syntax** for `opam list --columns`, allowing arbitrary field queries like `license:` ([ocaml/opam#6846](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6846))
group_summaries.group_overview:
- [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) led activity with 52 merged PRs including [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg)'s extensive RPC refactoring (14+ PRs), [Ali Caglayan](https://github.com/Alizter)'s 22+ PRs across CI/testing/fixes, Windows support advances by [Puneeth Chaganti](https://github.com/punchagan), and preparation for 3.21.1 release ([ocaml/dune#13557](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13557))
- [ocsigen/js_of_ocaml](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml) shipped **version 6.3.0** with 67 commits including compiler optimizations, correctness fixes, and DOM binding improvements by [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo) and [Jérôme Vouillon](https://github.com/vouillon)
- [ocaml/opam](https://github.com/ocaml/opam) merged documentation improvements by [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust) ([ocaml/opam#6846](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6846)) and active discussions on cmdliner upgrade with PowerShell completion support ([ocaml/opam#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853), [ocaml/opam#6849](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6849))

- [ocaml/ocamlfind](https://github.com/ocaml/ocamlfind), [ocaml/opam-file-format](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-file-format), and [ocaml-dune/spawn](https://github.com/ocaml-dune/spawn) had no recorded activity this week
group_summaries.activity_summary: Dune's internal refactoring with RPC reorganization, path system changes; js_of_ocaml compiler correctness fixes; ongoing PRs across merlin and ocaml-lsp
group_summaries.activity:
- [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) underwent **extensive RPC system refactoring** by [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg) reorganizing csexp_rpc into separate modules ([ocaml/dune#13550](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13550), [ocaml/dune#13548](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13548)), introducing abstract method names ([ocaml/dune#13578](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13578)), and breaking changes in write/close operations ([ocaml/dune#13569](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13569)); **path system improvements** removing `Path.exists` and `Path.is_directory` ([ocaml/dune#13583](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13583), [ocaml/dune#13582](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13582)); **Melange support** with package flag respecting ([ocaml/dune#13522](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13522)); and **BSD platform support** via ocaml-lmdb bump ([ocaml/dune#13560](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13560))
- [ocsigen/js_of_ocaml](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml) focused on **compiler correctness** fixing parallel renaming bug ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml@9cf9411](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/9cf94111319f3831627d178dca3390dd416d14b5)), Global_flow monotonicity ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml@61b2c25](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/commit/61b2c254c0a3da2ce96bc62bda140a76c141c28a)), and invalid simplifications; **DOM binding accuracy** with type fixes across submitEvent, mediaQueryListEvent, element properties; and **example/documentation improvements** across 12 demo applications
- [ocaml/merlin](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin) has [Charlène_Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo) improving **signature help for labelled parameters** with detailed feedback from [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos) ([ocaml/merlin#2032](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2032)) and [Tim ats](https://github.com/Tim-ats-d) adding test case for **declaration finding bug** ([ocaml/merlin#2034](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2034))
- [ocaml/opam](https://github.com/ocaml/opam) has [R. Boujbel](https://github.com/rjbou) opening draft PR to **expand `opam list` test coverage** ([ocaml/opam#6855](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6855)) and [Robin Bate Boerop](https://github.com/robinbb) proposing **`MAINTAINERS` file** addition ([ocaml/opam#6845](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/pull/6845))
group_summaries.cross_repository_work:
- **OCaml 5.5 support planning** coordinated across multiple repositories with [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) opening support requests in [ocaml/odoc#1401](https://github.com/ocaml/odoc/issues/1401) and participating in [ocaml/merlin#2024](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2024) discussions where [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos) confirmed upgrade work starting this week after modular explicit was merged upstream
- **Signature help improvements** spanning [ocaml/merlin](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin) and [ocaml/ocaml-lsp](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp) with [Charlène_Gros](https://github.com/Lucccyo) working on both repositories: labelled parameter fixes in [ocaml/merlin#2032](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2032) and ocamlformat integration in [ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1580](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1580)
- **Type declaration navigation bug** reported by [Tim ats](https://github.com/Tim-ats-d) affecting both [ocaml/merlin#2033](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin/issues/2033) and [ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1586](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1586), with [Ulysse](https://github.com/voodoos) confirming the issue originates in Merlin's typing environment

- **Windows platform improvements** progressing in both [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) with script execution ([ocaml/dune#13293](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13293)) and OS detection ([ocaml/dune#13536](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13536)), and [ocaml/opam](https://github.com/ocaml/opam) with PowerShell completion proposal ([ocaml/opam#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853))
group_summaries.notable_discussions:

group_summaries.brief_summary: Type system enhancements with bool# primitives, borrowing support, and Format_doc API in oxcaml/oxcaml
group_summaries.new_features_summary: Added bool# type with literals, borrowing support, -kind-verbosity flag, and Format_doc API
group_summaries.new_features:
- New `bool#` unboxed boolean type with `#true` and `#false` literal syntax added to [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml), enabling efficient representation of boolean values at the bit level ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5166](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5166))
- Borrowing support introduced in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) uniqueness analysis system by [Zesen Qian](https://github.com/riaqn), allowing temporary borrows of unique values with proper type checking and mode analysis ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5215](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5215))
- New `-kind-verbosity` compiler flag in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) by [Liam Stevenson](https://github.com/liam923) controls kind printing detail level with three modes: 0 (not verbose), 1 (expanded), and 2 (expanded with all modality bounds) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5397](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5397), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5398](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5398))
- Format_doc module backported to [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) from upstream OCaml by [Simon Spies](https://github.com/spiessimon), providing structured document formatting with type-safe printer combinators ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5357](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5357))
- Type representation syntax `repr_` added to [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) source syntax with `Ptyp_repr` and `Ttyp_repr` AST nodes for explicit type representation annotations ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5068](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5068))
- Runtime optimization in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) eliminating stack switches on noalloc C calls, improving performance for FFI boundaries ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5224](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5224))
- Interference graph extracted to dedicated module `Regalloc_interf_graph` in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) register allocator by [Xavier Clerc](https://github.com/xclerc) with cleaner API and degree tracking ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5237](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5237))
- x86 binary emitter fix in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) for shift instructions with memory destination and CL register preventing incorrect code generation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5369](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5369))
group_summaries.group_overview:
- All activity concentrated in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with 33 contributors merging type system enhancements, upstream backports, and compiler optimizations
- [oxcaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/oxcaml/opam-repository), [oxcaml/merlin](https://github.com/oxcaml/merlin), [oxcaml/js_of_ocaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/js_of_ocaml), and [janestreet/opam-repository](https://github.com/janestreet/opam-repository) had no recorded activity this week
- 21 new PRs opened in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) covering functors with modalities, manual initialization, bytecode optimizations, and small int operations

group_summaries.emerging_trends:
- Unboxed types expansion continues in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with `bool#` type ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5166](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5166)) joining existing bits8/float32 primitives as OXCaml extends beyond OCaml's value kind system
- Modality and mode system maturation showing sustained activity in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) across multiple contributors working on functors ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5371](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5371)), aliased many requirements ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5364](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5364)), redundant warnings ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5373](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5373)), and cross-module interactions
- Upstream OCaml 5.4 integration accelerating in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with Format_doc backport affecting 253 files ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5357](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5357)) and array runtime changes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5339](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5339)) representing continued synchronization effort
- Borrowing semantics introduction in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) marks evolution of uniqueness analysis beyond simple ownership to support temporary borrows ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5215](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5215)), bringing Rust-like capabilities to OCaml's type system
- CFG backend hardening in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with [Xavier Clerc](https://github.com/xclerc)'s systematic work on invariant checking ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5390](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5390)), liveness validation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5375](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5375)), and terminator arity tests ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5388](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5388)) showing maturation toward production stability
- Flambda2 optimization refinement in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) through reaper fixes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5377](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5377), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5374](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5374)), match-in-match improvements ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5119](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5119)), and inlining heuristic tuning ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5383](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5383))
- Build system evolution in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) through Chamelon module minimization ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5356](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5356)) and ocamlformat consistency improvements ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5387](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5387)) supporting better developer experience
- Type representation at syntax level in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) with `repr_` additions ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5068](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5068)) enabling more explicit control over memory layout and representation choices

group_summaries.brief_summary: Module-dependent functions merged, 20 new PRs opened covering platform support and stdlib additions
group_summaries.new_features_summary: Module-dependent functions, lazy optimization, stdlib additions, runtime fixes
group_summaries.new_features:
- **Module-dependent functions** (modular explicits) merged to [ocaml/ocaml](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml), allowing functions parameterized over modules using `(module M : S) -> t[M]` syntax as a lightweight alternative to functors ([ocaml/ocaml#13275](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13275), [ocaml/ocaml#14048](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14048)) by [Samuel Vivien](https://github.com/samsa1) and [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche)
- **Lazy value optimization** for structured constants eliminates need for `Lazy.from_val` in most cases by optimizing `lazy v` when `v` is a constant ([ocaml/ocaml#13919](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13919)) by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche)
- **Infix-tag bug fix** in minor collector that could cause segfaults in multi-domain programs ([ocaml/ocaml#14495](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14495)) by [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes)
- **Runtime_events segfault fix** correcting error checking when calling `mmap()` ([ocaml/ocaml#14519](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14519)) by [Mark Elvers](https://github.com/mtelvers)
- **TSan function signature** corrected to fix `__tsan_func_exit()` mismatch ([ocaml/ocaml#14082](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14082)) by [Hari Hara Naveen S](https://github.com/Johan511)
- **Thread-safe POSIX functions** adopted in libunix for better concurrency support ([ocaml/ocaml#13700](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13700)) by [Antonin Décimo](https://github.com/MisterDA)
- **C++ compiler detection** improved with proper header testing ([ocaml/ocaml#14526](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14526), [ocaml/ocaml#14498](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14498)) by [Antonin Décimo](https://github.com/MisterDA) and [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27)
- **Dune build system** restored after recent breakage ([ocaml/ocaml#14529](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14529)) by [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27)
- **Opcode synchronization** cleaned up between ocamlrun and ocamlc by eliminating `jumptbl.h` and `opnames.h` ([ocaml/ocaml#14488](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14488), [ocaml/ocaml#14528](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14528)) by [David Allsopp](https://github.com/dra27)
- **Ptype_external printing** fixed in AST output ([ocaml/ocaml#14518](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14518)) by [Patrick Ferris](https://github.com/patricoferris)
- **Shell script portability** improved for CI infrastructure ([ocaml/ocaml#14520](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14520)) by [Damien Doligez](https://github.com/damiendoligez)
- **Documentation terminology** updated replacing "redefine" with "redeclare" in C interface docs ([ocaml/ocaml#14521](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14521)) by [Antonin Décimo](https://github.com/MisterDA)
- **Flat-float-array test** split for better testsuite organization ([ocaml/ocaml#14523](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14523)) by [Florian Angeletti](https://github.com/Octachron)
- **OCAMLTEST manual** rewritten from Org format to AsciiDoc ([ocaml/ocaml#14510](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14510)) by [Sacha Ayoun](https://github.com/giltho)
group_summaries.activity_summary: 20 new PRs opened for type system enhancements, stdlib additions, and platform support
group_summaries.activity:
- **Type system proposals** opened including locally abstract types in recursive let bindings by [Alistair](https://github.com/johnyob) ([ocaml/ocaml#14517](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14517)), unlimited non-constant constructors by [Vincent Laviron](https://github.com/lthls) ([ocaml/ocaml#14507](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14507)), nested record definitions by [David Sancho](https://github.com/davesnx) ([ocaml/ocaml#14527](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14527)), pure functors by [Samuel Vivien](https://github.com/samsa1) ([ocaml/ocaml#13905](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13905)), and Merlin typing recovery integration by [Xavier Van de Woestyne](https://github.com/xvw) ([ocaml/ocaml#14241](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14241))
- **Standard library additions** proposed including `Fun.todo` with code location by [Olivier Nicole](https://github.com/OlivierNicole) and [Pavlo Khrystenko](https://github.com/pkhry) ([ocaml/ocaml#14525](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14525), [ocaml/ocaml#13101](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13101)), `List.append_map` and `List.rev_append_map` by [Sylvain Boilard](https://github.com/SylvainBoilard) ([ocaml/ocaml#13554](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13554)), `String.drop_prefix` and `String.drop_suffix` by [Michael Neumann](https://github.com/mneumann) ([ocaml/ocaml#14487](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14487)), and `Atomic.modify`/`Atomic.modify_get` operations by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([ocaml/ocaml#10798](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/10798))
- **s390x architecture support** progressing with shared library crash fix by [Zane Hambly](https://github.com/Zaneham) ([ocaml/ocaml#14514](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14514)), native atomic fetch-add implementation ([ocaml/ocaml#14524](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14524)), and CFI information fixes by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([ocaml/ocaml#14500](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14500))
- **POWER architecture work** advancing with TSan shadow stack fixes by [Olivier Nicole](https://github.com/OlivierNicole) ([ocaml/ocaml#14302](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14302)), CFI support by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([ocaml/ocaml#14482](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14482)), and frame pointer implementation ([ocaml/ocaml#14505](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14505))
- **Additional platform improvements** including RISC-V frame pointer support by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([ocaml/ocaml#14506](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14506)), FreeBSD frame pointer testsuite updates ([ocaml/ocaml#14530](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14530)), and AMD64 endbr64 emission optimization by [Zane Hambly](https://github.com/Zaneham) ([ocaml/ocaml#14515](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14515))
- **Runtime and memory management** enhancements with slow domain join fix by [Damien Doligez](https://github.com/damiendoligez) ([ocaml/ocaml#13026](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13026)), gradual minor heap address reservation by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([ocaml/ocaml#14162](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14162)), thread-local storage improvements ([ocaml/ocaml#13355](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13355)), missing minor heap allocations fix by [Tim McGilchrist](https://github.com/tmcgilchrist) ([ocaml/ocaml#14522](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14522)), runtime events cleanup on SIGINT by [Stephen Sherratt](https://github.com/gridbugs) ([ocaml/ocaml#14470](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14470)), ephe_mark minor fix ([ocaml/ocaml#14338](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14338)), mutex-protected lazy thunks ([ocaml/ocaml#14393](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14393)), No_scan_tag macro replacements by [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes) ([ocaml/ocaml#14493](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14493)), and `Obj.dup` closure fix ([ocaml/ocaml#14492](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14492))
- **Tooling improvements** with warning 16 (`unerasable-optional-argument`) check enhancements by [Alistair](https://github.com/johnyob) ([ocaml/ocaml#14512](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14512)), ocp-indent check addition ([ocaml/ocaml#14485](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14485)), and Dune build dependency improvements for opcodes sanity by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([ocaml/ocaml#14509](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14509))
group_summaries.emerging_trends:
- **Cross-platform architecture support** intensifying with parallel work on s390x ([ocaml/ocaml#14514](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14514), [ocaml/ocaml#14524](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14524), [ocaml/ocaml#14500](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14500)), POWER ([ocaml/ocaml#14302](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14302), [ocaml/ocaml#14482](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14482), [ocaml/ocaml#14505](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14505)), RISC-V ([ocaml/ocaml#14506](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14506)), and AMD64 ([ocaml/ocaml#14515](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14515)) covering CFI information, frame pointers, atomic operations, and TSan compatibility
- **Module system evolution** continuing with module-dependent functions now merged ([ocaml/ocaml#13275](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13275)) and pure functors proposed ([ocaml/ocaml#13905](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13905)), suggesting ongoing work to make the module system more flexible

- **Type system refinements** in progress including locally abstract types in recursive bindings ([ocaml/ocaml#14517](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14517)), unlimited non-constant constructors ([ocaml/ocaml#14507](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14507)), nested record definitions ([ocaml/ocaml#14527](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14527)), and Merlin typing recovery integration ([ocaml/ocaml#14241](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14241))
- **Runtime reliability improvements** addressing multi-domain issues ([ocaml/ocaml#14495](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14495)), memory management ([ocaml/ocaml#13026](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13026), [ocaml/ocaml#14162](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14162), [ocaml/ocaml#14522](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14522)), and profiling tools ([ocaml/ocaml#14519](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14519), [ocaml/ocaml#14470](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14470))

group_summaries.activity_summary: OCaml 5.5 compatibility PR opened in picos and MacOS block device PR closed in eio
group_summaries.activity:
