weekly_summary.brief_summary: Module-dependent functions merged, js_of_ocaml 6.3.0 released, 52 dune PRs merged, 19 opam packages released, €100K security grants announced
weekly_summary.new_features_summary: Module-dependent functions, lazy optimization, js_of_ocaml 6.3.0 WASM optimizations, dune markdown docs, Lwt 6.1.0 stable release
weekly_summary.new_features:
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Module-dependent functions** (modular explicits) merged to [ocaml/ocaml](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml), enabling functions parameterized over modules using `(module M : S) -> t[M]` syntax as a lightweight alternative to functors ([ocaml/ocaml#13275](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13275), [ocaml/ocaml#14048](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14048)) by [Samuel Vivien](https://github.com/samsa1) and [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Lazy value optimization** for structured constants eliminates need for `Lazy.from_val` in most cases by optimizing `lazy v` when `v` is a constant ([ocaml/ocaml#13919](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13919)) by [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Infix-tag bug fix** in minor collector that could cause segfaults in multi-domain programs ([ocaml/ocaml#14495](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14495)) by [Nick Barnes](https://github.com/NickBarnes)
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Runtime_events segfault fix** correcting error checking when calling `mmap()` ([ocaml/ocaml#14519](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14519))
- __RUMINANT:core__ **TSan function signature** corrected to fix `__tsan_func_exit()` mismatch ([ocaml/ocaml#14082](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14082))
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Thread-safe POSIX functions** adopted in libunix for better concurrency support ([ocaml/ocaml#13700](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13700))
- __RUMINANT:core__ **C++ compiler detection** improved with proper header testing ([ocaml/ocaml#14526](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14526), [ocaml/ocaml#14498](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14498))
- __RUMINANT:core__ **Dune build system** restored after recent breakage ([ocaml/ocaml#14529](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14529))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ New **`bool#` unboxed boolean type** with `#true` and `#false` literal syntax added to [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml), enabling efficient representation of boolean values at the bit level ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5166](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5166))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Borrowing support** introduced in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) uniqueness analysis system, allowing temporary borrows of unique values with proper type checking and mode analysis ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5215](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5215))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ New **`-kind-verbosity` compiler flag** in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) controls kind printing detail level with three modes: 0 (not verbose), 1 (expanded), and 2 (expanded with all modality bounds) ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5397](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5397), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5398](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5398))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ **Format_doc module** backported to [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) from upstream OCaml, providing structured document formatting with type-safe printer combinators ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5357](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5357))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Lwt 6.1.0** stable release brings the promises and event-driven I/O library to production readiness after alpha and beta testing ([ocaml/opam-repository#29295](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29295), [ocaml/opam-repository#29336](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29336)) by [Raphaël Proust](https://github.com/raphael-proust)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Security grants announcement** published with up to €100,000 available for projects strengthening OCaml ecosystem security, with proposals due March 1st, 2026 ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3483](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3483))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **OCaml history page** restored documenting the language's evolution from Caml at INRIA in the 1980s through modern OCaml ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3479](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3479))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Menhir 20260203** parser generator release across 5 packages with fixed Rocq back-end printing bug ([ocaml/opam-repository#29331](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29331), [ocaml/opam-repository#29332](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29332))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Camlzip 1.14** compression library fixes errors in local file headers for files larger than 4 GB ([ocaml/opam-repository#29352](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29352))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Layoutz 0.0.1/0.0.2** new zero-dependency terminal layout DSL for creating structured terminal output including boxes, tables, and trees ([ocaml/opam-repository#29327](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29327), [ocaml/opam-repository#29328](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29328))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) added **markdown documentation generation** via `dune build @doc-markdown` using odoc 3.1.0 ([ocaml/dune#12581](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/12581))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **OxCaml `.cms` files support** in [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) for trimmed type information with `(using oxcaml 0.1)` ([ocaml/dune#13397](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13397))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Windows script execution** with shebang parsing in [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) ([ocaml/dune#13293](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13293))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ **Windows OS detection** for Cygwin/MSYS2 in [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) ([ocaml/dune#13536](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13536))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [ocsigen/js_of_ocaml](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml) **released version 6.3.0** (February 6) with **constant sinking optimization** moving declarations closer to usage ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2167](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2167)), **WASM-safe `Dom_html.onload`** function ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#1948](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/1948)), **`Js.Unsafe.runtime_value` API** for referencing runtime values ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2086](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2086)), and eliminated unnecessary boolean conversions ([ocsigen/js_of_ocaml#2168](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml/issues/2168))
- __RUMINANT:tools__ [ocaml/ocaml-lsp](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp) now applies **ocamlformat to signature help** for improved readability of long function signatures ([ocaml/ocaml-lsp#1580](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp/issues/1580))

weekly_summary.group_overview:
- __RUMINANT:core__ The **OCaml compiler** merged the highly-anticipated **module-dependent functions** feature by [Samuel Vivien](https://github.com/samsa1) and [Gabriel Scherer](https://github.com/gasche) ([ocaml/ocaml#13275](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13275)), representing a lightweight alternative to functors using `(module M : S) -> t[M]` syntax, alongside 20 newly opened PRs covering type system enhancements, stdlib additions, and cross-platform architecture support
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ The **OxCaml compiler** advanced its type system with 33 contributors merging unboxed primitives (`bool#` type), borrowing support for uniqueness analysis, and extensive upstream synchronization through Format_doc backport affecting 253 files ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5357](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5357))
- __RUMINANT:multicore__ The **multicore group** showed minimal activity with only 2 of 9 repositories active, focused on OCaml 5.5 compatibility preparation in [ocaml-multicore/picos](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos) ([ocaml-multicore/picos#387](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos/pull/387)) by [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ The **ecosystem repositories** merged 19 package releases in [ocaml/opam-repository](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository) including production-ready Lwt 6.1.0 and announced €100,000 in security grants ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3483](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3483)), while restoring OCaml's historical documentation and expanding Japanese translations
- __RUMINANT:tools__ The **development tools** led activity with [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg) merging 52 PRs in [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) including extensive RPC refactoring and markdown documentation support, while [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo) shipped js_of_ocaml 6.3.0 with compiler optimizations and correctness fixes across 67 commits

weekly_summary.activity_summary: 20 new core PRs for stdlib/type system, 21 oxcaml PRs for functors/bytecode, dune RPC reorganization, js_of_ocaml correctness fixes
weekly_summary.activity:
- __RUMINANT:core__ Type system proposals opened including locally abstract types in recursive let bindings ([ocaml/ocaml#14517](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14517)), unlimited non-constant constructors ([ocaml/ocaml#14507](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14507)), nested record definitions ([ocaml/ocaml#14527](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14527)), pure functors ([ocaml/ocaml#13905](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13905)), and Merlin typing recovery integration ([ocaml/ocaml#14241](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14241))
- __RUMINANT:core__ Standard library additions proposed including `Fun.todo` with code location ([ocaml/ocaml#14525](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14525), [ocaml/ocaml#13101](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13101)), `List.append_map` and `List.rev_append_map` ([ocaml/ocaml#13554](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13554)), `String.drop_prefix` and `String.drop_suffix` ([ocaml/ocaml#14487](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14487)), and `Atomic.modify`/`Atomic.modify_get` operations ([ocaml/ocaml#10798](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/10798))
- __RUMINANT:core__ s390x architecture support progressing with shared library crash fix ([ocaml/ocaml#14514](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14514)), native atomic fetch-add implementation ([ocaml/ocaml#14524](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14524)), and CFI information fixes ([ocaml/ocaml#14500](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14500))
- __RUMINANT:core__ POWER architecture work advancing with TSan shadow stack fixes ([ocaml/ocaml#14302](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14302)), CFI support ([ocaml/ocaml#14482](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14482)), and frame pointer implementation ([ocaml/ocaml#14505](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14505))
- __RUMINANT:core__ Additional platform improvements including RISC-V frame pointer support ([ocaml/ocaml#14506](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14506)), FreeBSD frame pointer testsuite updates ([ocaml/ocaml#14530](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14530)), and AMD64 endbr64 emission optimization ([ocaml/ocaml#14515](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14515))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ 21 new PRs opened in [oxcaml/oxcaml](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml) including functors with modalities ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5371](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5371)), manual module initialization ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5395](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5395)), bytecode deep copy of product fields ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5386](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5386)), small int ctz/clz/popcnt ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5393](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5393)), and parsing for `let poly_` and `val poly_` syntax ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5392](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5392))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ Upstream backports progressed with Format_doc refinement PRs ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5378](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5378), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5380](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5380), [oxcaml/oxcaml#5381](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5381)) and build system conflict resolution ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5376](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5376))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ Flambda2 reaper improvements with exception handler parameter fix preventing incorrect unboxing ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5377](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5377)), overzealous rebuild check fix ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5374](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5374)), and dead code removal ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5379](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5379))
- __RUMINANT:oxcaml__ CFG backend work merging simplify terminator bug fix ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5389](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5389)) and opening liveness checking ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5375](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5375)), basic invariant validation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5390](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5390)), and arity tests for terminators ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5388](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5388))
- __RUMINANT:multicore__ [Kate](https://github.com/kit-ty-kate) opened OCaml 5.5 compatibility PR in [ocaml-multicore/picos](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos) ([ocaml-multicore/picos#387](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos/pull/387)) to prepare for the upcoming compiler release, addressing changes detailed in [ocaml/ocaml#14224](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14224)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Js_of_ocaml 6.3.0** opened with 8 packages bringing WASM optimizations including number unboxing, reference unboxing, constant sinking pass, shell completion scripts, improved NaN handling, and numerous DOM/WebGL binding fixes ([ocaml/opam-repository#29348](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29348)) by [@hhugo](https://github.com/hhugo)
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Testcontainers-OCaml** library submission adding Docker container support for integration tests with 11 packages covering PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ, Elasticsearch, Memcached, LocalStack, and MockServer modules ([ocaml/opam-repository#29340](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29340))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Trace 0.11** tracing library rework with lighter collector using open sum types, extensible metrics, removal of global state, and poly variants for user_data/span_flavor ([ocaml/opam-repository#29345](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29345))
- __RUMINANT:ecosystem__ **Japanese translation** work continued with draft PR containing 2,493 additions across 86 files ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3489](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3489))

-**Module system evolution** continuing with module-dependent functions now merged ([ocaml/ocaml#13275](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13275)) and pure functors proposed ([ocaml/ocaml#13905](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13905)), suggesting ongoing work to make the module system more flexible

-**Standard library expansion** with concurrent proposals for `Fun` module additions ([ocaml/ocaml#14525](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14525), [ocaml/ocaml#13101](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13101)), `String` utilities ([ocaml/ocaml#14487](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14487)), `List` operations ([ocaml/ocaml#13554](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/13554)), and `Atomic` enhancements ([ocaml/ocaml#10798](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/10798))

-**Type system refinements** in progress including locally abstract types in recursive bindings ([ocaml/ocaml#14517](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14517)), unlimited non-constant constructors ([ocaml/ocaml#14507](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14507)), nested record definitions ([ocaml/ocaml#14527](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14527)), and Merlin typing recovery integration ([ocaml/ocaml#14241](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14241))
tools: -**Internal code quality focus** with [Rudi Grinberg](https://github.com/rgrinberg) leading systematic refactoring across [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) RPC and path systems, reorganizing over 2000 lines while reducing duplication, paralleled by [ocsigen/js_of_ocaml](https://github.com/ocsigen/js_of_ocaml)'s compiler correctness work fixing edge cases in optimization passes

-**Windows ecosystem maturation** accelerating with [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) adding script execution ([ocaml/dune#13293](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13293)) and OS detection ([ocaml/dune#13536](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13536)), [ocaml/opam](https://github.com/ocaml/opam) discussing PowerShell completion ([ocaml/opam#6853](https://github.com/ocaml/opam/issues/6853)), and user reports showing growing Windows adoption

-**Editor tooling polish** with improvements to signature help across [ocaml/merlin](https://github.com/ocaml/merlin) and [ocaml/ocaml-lsp](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml-lsp), addressing user experience details for labelled parameters and formatting

-**OxCaml compiler integration** expanding in [ocaml/dune](https://github.com/ocaml/dune) with `.cms` file support ([ocaml/dune#13397](https://github.com/ocaml/dune/issues/13397)) and compatibility fixes, indicating growing adoption of the new compiler variant
ecosystem: -**Library maturation cycle** visible through Lwt's progression from alpha/beta to stable 6.1.0 release, showing careful testing and version naming corrections before production deployment ([ocaml/opam-repository#29295](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29295))

-**Testing infrastructure expansion** with testcontainers-ocaml introducing Docker-based integration testing patterns to OCaml ecosystem, raising CI policy questions about packages requiring external services ([ocaml/opam-repository#29340](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29340))

-**WASM compilation improvements** continuing in js_of_ocaml with number unboxing, reference unboxing, and constant sinking optimizations ([ocaml/opam-repository#29348](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29348))

-**Security ecosystem growth** signaled by €100,000 grants announcement targeting projects strengthening OCaml ecosystem security ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3483](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3483))

-**Internationalization expansion** with sustained Japanese translation work spanning 86 files demonstrating commitment to global OCaml community ([ocaml/ocaml.org#3489](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml.org/issues/3489))

-**OCaml 5.5 compatibility** focus with multiple packages adding compatibility improvements as ecosystem prepares for upcoming release ([ocaml/opam-repository#29349](https://github.com/ocaml/opam-repository/issues/29349))
oxcaml: -**Unboxed types expansion** continues with `bool#` type ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5166](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5166)) joining existing bits8/float32 primitives as OXCaml extends beyond OCaml's value kind system

-**Modality and mode system maturation** showing sustained activity across multiple contributors working on functors ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5371](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5371)), aliased many requirements ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5364](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5364)), redundant warnings ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5373](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5373)), and cross-module interactions

-**Borrowing semantics introduction** marks evolution of uniqueness analysis beyond simple ownership to support temporary borrows ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5215](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5215)), bringing Rust-like capabilities to OCaml's type system

-**Upstream OCaml 5.4 integration** accelerating with Format_doc backport affecting 253 files ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5357](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5357)) and array runtime changes ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5339](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5339)) representing continued synchronization effort

-**CFG backend hardening** with systematic work on invariant checking ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5390](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5390)), liveness validation ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5375](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5375)), and terminator arity tests ([oxcaml/oxcaml#5388](https://github.com/oxcaml/oxcaml/issues/5388)) showing maturation toward production stability
multicore: -**Preparation for OCaml 5.5 compatibility** beginning in the multicore ecosystem with [ocaml-multicore/picos#387](https://github.com/ocaml-multicore/picos/pull/387) targeting upstream changes from [ocaml/ocaml#14224](https://github.com/ocaml/ocaml/issues/14224)
